tldr_zh: OpenAI推出Daybreak安全工具，Google投資A24開發AI電影技術，Valve Steam Machine高價上市引發遊戲主機漲價隱憂
tldr_en: OpenAI launches Daybreak security tools; Google invests $75M in A24 for AI filmmaking; Valve's pricey Steam Machine signals rising console costs

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出Daybreak安全計畫，助力全球組織修補漏洞
items.title_en: OpenAI Launches Daybreak Initiative to Secure Organizations Globally
items.summary_zh: OpenAI發布Daybreak工具套件，包括Codex Security和GPT-5.5-Cyber，幫助組織大規模發現、驗證和修補安全漏洞。同時推出Patch the Planet計畫，支持開源軟體維護者利用AI和專家審查尋找及修復漏洞，強化全球軟體供應鏈安全。
items.summary_en: OpenAI introduced Daybreak tools including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale. The company also launched Patch the Planet initiative to assist open-source maintainers in identifying and fixing security issues with AI-powered assistance and expert review.

items.title_zh: 三星電子全球部署ChatGPT Enterprise和Codex
items.title_en: Samsung Electronics Deploys ChatGPT Enterprise Globally
items.summary_zh: 三星電子成為OpenAI最大企業AI應用戶之一，在全球員工中部署ChatGPT Enterprise和Codex。此舉標誌著企業級AI應用的重要里程碑，展現科技龍頭對生成式AI的重視。
items.summary_en: Samsung Electronics became one of OpenAI's largest enterprise AI deployments, rolling out ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide. This marks a significant milestone in enterprise AI adoption among major technology companies.

items.title_zh: LLM臨床應用現實差距大，醫學AI考試高分不等於看病能力
items.title_en: Medical AI Shows Gap Between Test Scores and Clinical Performance
items.summary_zh: 美國麻省總醫院研究發現，在美國醫師執照考試中表現優異的大型語言模型，面對真實醫療情境時效能大幅下降。國考成績92分的AI模型在臨床任務中僅達44.8分，凸顯AI應用於醫療領域仍需謹慎評估。
items.summary_en: Research from Mass General Brigham revealed that large language models achieving near-physician-level scores on standardized medical exams perform significantly worse in real clinical scenarios, with models scoring 92 on board exams achieving only 44.8 on clinical tasks.

items.title_zh: Google投資A24 7,500萬美元開發AI電影製作技術
items.title_en: Google Invests $75M in A24 for AI Movie Production Tools
items.summary_zh: Google DeepMind與電影公司A24合作開發AI電影製作技術，Google投資約7,500萬美元。該合作旨在幫助電影製作人利用AI擴展故事敘述可能性，標誌著科技巨頭在娛樂產業應用AI的新探索。
items.summary_en: Google's DeepMind partnered with film company A24 with a $75 million investment to develop AI-powered movie production technologies. The collaboration aims to help filmmakers expand their storytelling possibilities using AI tools.

items.title_zh: Valve Steam Machine正式發售，512GB版本1049美元再掀遊戲主機漲價潮
items.title_en: Valve's Steam Machine Launches at $1,049, Signaling Rising Console Prices
items.summary_zh: Valve推出Steam Machine遊戲主機，512GB版本售價1049美元，2TB版本1349美元，創遊戲主機歷史新高。全球RAM短缺導致PC和遊戲主機成本暴增，預示未來遊戲主機價格將持續攀升。
items.summary_en: Valve's Steam Machine launched at $1,049 for 512GB and $1,349 for 2TB, marking historically high console prices. Global RAM shortages and component costs are driving up gaming hardware prices, signaling a more expensive future for game consoles.

items.title_zh: Groq AI晶片公司融資6.5億美元，Nvidia併購後重振陣容
items.title_en: AI Chipmaker Groq Raises $650M After Nvidia Deal
items.summary_zh: AI晶片製造商Groq確認融資6.5億美元，並在Nvidia的2000億美元非併購協議後重新調整團隊，聘請新主管。Groq積極轉向neocloud業務，尋求在AI基礎設施市場的新定位。
items.summary_en: AI chipmaker Groq confirmed a $650 million funding round and is hiring new executives following Nvidia's $20 billion not-acquisition deal. The company is pivoting toward its neocloud business to carve out a unique position in the AI infrastructure market.

items.title_zh: Microsoft與雪佛龍簽署20年協議，建美國最大燃氣數據中心
items.title_en: Microsoft and Chevron Plan Major Gas-Powered Data Center
items.summary_zh: Microsoft與石油公司雪佛龍簽署20年電力購買協議，計畫建造美國最大規模燃氣電廠驅動的數據中心。此舉引發氣候擔憂，將鎖定數十年碳排放承諾。
items.summary_en: Microsoft signed a 20-year power purchase agreement with Chevron to build one of the US's largest gas-powered data center projects. The deal locks in decades of carbon emissions from a new natural gas power plant.

items.title_zh: LG電視應用程式近半含有住宅代理SDK，用戶隱私遭威脅
items.title_en: Nearly Half of LG Smart TV Apps Contain Residential Proxy SDKs
items.summary_zh: 資安研究顯示LG智慧電視近半數應用程式內含住宅代理軟體工具包，可能被用於未授權網路活動，威脅用戶隱私與安全。此發現凸顯智慧家居裝置的隱私風險。
items.summary_en: Security researchers found that nearly 50% of LG smart TV apps contain residential proxy SDKs that could enable unauthorized network activity and threaten user privacy. The discovery highlights privacy risks in connected home devices.

items.title_zh: 警察利用Flock追蹤系統跟蹤女性，凸顯隱私執法漏洞
items.title_en: Police Chiefs Using Flock System to Stalk Women Highlights Warrant Gaps
items.summary_zh: 調查發現警察利用Flock車牌識別系統對女性進行跟蹤，暴露執法中的隱私保護漏洞。案例顯示當前法律對AI監控工具的授權要求不足，亟需加強隱私保護規範。
items.summary_en: Investigation revealed police chiefs using Flock tracking system to stalk women, exposing gaps in warrant requirements for AI surveillance tools. The cases highlight need for stronger privacy protections in law enforcement's use of surveillance technology.

items.title_zh: 美國暫時解除伊朗石油制裁，雙方就核協議重啟談判
items.title_en: US Temporarily Lifts Iran Oil Sanctions Amid Nuclear Talks
items.summary_zh: 美國財政部暫時解除對伊朗石油制裁至8月21日，允許伊朗生產與銷售原油。此舉標誌著美伊就核協議談判取得進展，伊朗同意國際原子能機構入境檢查。
items.summary_en: The US Treasury temporarily lifted Iran oil sanctions until August 21 after Iran agreed to IAEA nuclear inspections. The move signals progress in US-Iran negotiations to end Middle East conflicts and revive nuclear agreements.

items.title_zh: 醫療產業成勒索軟體主要攻擊目標，臺灣受害案例增幅明顯
items.title_en: Healthcare Sector Faces Surging Ransomware Attacks, Taiwan Sees Notable Growth
items.summary_zh: 資安威脅情報業者報告指出，過去90天全球2,388個組織遭勒索軟體入侵，其中216個為醫療機構，較前期增長8.5%。醫療業已成為全球第三大受害產業，臺灣的醫療機構受害案例增幅尤為明顯。
items.summary_en: Cybersecurity threat intelligence report found 2,388 organizations hit by ransomware in 90 days, with 216 from healthcare sector—an 8.5% increase. Healthcare is now the third most-affected industry globally, with Taiwan seeing notable growth in victim cases.
